machines.label: Surface Laptop 7 ARM64
checks: FirstLogon completes and resumes after interruption
Surface catalog driver package is selected and classified
offline driver injection excludes firmware-class drivers
YASB and thide start for the live user
Raycast starts and owns the launcher path
physical Copilot key opens the expected target
ARM64 Everything backend is native and hash-verified
Windhawk remains excluded until baseline ARM64 behavior is known

machines.label: ThinkPad Return AMD64
checks: FirstLogon completes
AutoWipeDisk0 behavior is explicitly confirmed
standard Windows desktop starts without extra shell layers
Edge keep path is honored
Ubuntu WSL selection completes
no launcher is installed

machines.label: Alienware Aurora AMD64
checks: Manual disk mode is preserved
Helium and Zen browser selections install
Neovim and Zed editor selections install
Nilesoft shell integration applies
no launcher is installed
gaming removal remains selected

evidence: LiveInstallAudit.json when audit is enabled or run manually
